Tech Notes: Temperature warning appeared again during first production block
Action Taken: Verified cooler fan operation and scheduled oil sampling

Tech Notes: Press vibration worsened after restart and sound changed under load
Action Taken: Kept work order open for bearing replacement window

Tech Notes: Coolant nozzle partially blocked by chips
Action Taken: Cleared nozzle and replaced screen gasket

Tech Notes: Spindle alarm occurred twice before warmup completed
Action Taken: Replaced spindle sensor cable and documented restart test

Tech Notes: Weld bead shifted after fixture changeover
Action Taken: Recalibrated robot frame and tightened fixture stop

Tech Notes: Oil temperature alarm returned after two-hour runtime
Action Taken: Opened cooler service request and staged spare filter kit

Tech Notes: Belt edge moved toward guard rail at transfer
Action Taken: Reset tracking roller and confirmed stable belt path

Tech Notes: Filter pressure warning persisted after booth startup
Action Taken: Replaced secondary filter and cleaned gauge line

Tech Notes: Feed motor remained hot after lubrication check
Action Taken: Escalated to planned downtime for bearing and lubrication inspection

Tech Notes: Pressure spike repeated during second shift startup
Action Taken: Cleaned intake filter and checked regulator response
